reason: Cannot write behavioral test that discriminates bug-from-fix in Node.js 22 environment: (1) In Node.js 22, new Date() handles the same ISO date formats (with timezone offsets) as dayjs() - no format exists to discriminate bug-from-fix. (2) The browser-specific bug cannot be replicated in Docker container. (3) Cannot import the actual createChartOptions function due to TypeScript path alias complexity. (4) Behavioral tests testing dayjs() in isolation pass on BOTH base and gold because dayjs() works regardless of whether the fix was applied to utils.ts. Original text-based tests at least correctly fail on base code (checking for 'dayjs(item.x[1]).valueOf()' presence in source). Anti-cheating: tests contain exact expected strings which is unsolvable without Dockerfile changes (solution/solve.sh contains exact patch).
